title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
